items.title: Ursodeoxycholic acid alleviates aortic aneurysm and dissection through the intestinal farnesoid X receptor/ceramide synthase 2 axis
items.author: Liangwan Chen
items.content: Human and mouse experimental models integrated with targeted bile acid metabolomics demonstrate that ursodeoxycholic acid inhibits the occurrence of aortic aneurysm and dissection through the intestinal farnesoid X receptor/ceramide synthase 2 axis.

items.title: TLR2 and TLR4 bridge physiological and pathological inflammation in the reproductive system
items.author: Akio Miyamoto
items.content: This review summarizes how TLR2 and TLR4 mediate physiological and pathological inflammation in reproduction, highlighting their signaling pathways, regulatory mechanisms, and implications for fertility and therapeutic strategies.

items.title: A modular fluorescent camera unit for wound imaging
items.author: Mircea Teodorescu
items.content: A modular fluorescent camera unit is developed and provides insights into the spatiotemporal role of biomarkers (pH and Nitric Oxide) in wound healing

items.title: TTK activates ATR through RPA2 phosphorylation to promote olaparib resistance in ovarian cancer
items.author: Kai Teng
items.content: TTK inhibition overcomes olaparib resistance in HR-proficient ovarian cancer cells by suppressing RPA2-S33 phosphorylation and ATR signaling, offering a potential strategy to enhance PARPi therapy in ovarian cancer.

items.title: Author Correction: Geometric deep learning improves generalizability of MHC-bound peptide predictions
items.author: Li C. Xue
items.content: Author Correction: Geometric deep learning improves generalizability of MHC-bound peptide predictions

items.title: 3BTRON: A Blood-Brain Barrier Recognition Network
items.author: Payam Barnaghi
items.content: A deep transfer learning framework to analyse the architecture of the blood-brain barrier in electron microscopy images and guide the discovery of age-related changes that may lead to the brain’s regional vulnerability to neurodegenerative diseases.

items.title: Endometrial stromal Menin supports endometrial receptivity by maintaining homeostasis of WNT signaling pathway through H3K4me3 during WOI
items.author: Xiaona Lin
items.content: Stromal Menin upregulates the expression of SFRP2 and DKK1 through H3K4me3 to limit the excessive activation of the WNT signalling pathway and support normal endometrial receptivity during window of implantation.

items.title: Author Correction: The role of IGF2BP3/SPOP/c-Myc loop in paclitaxel resistance of endometrial cancer
items.author: Xiaofeng Jin
items.content: Author Correction: The role of IGF2BP3/SPOP/c-Myc loop in paclitaxel resistance of endometrial cancer
